ModMetadata.Name: Custom Decals
ModMetadata.Author: KingBR
ModMetadata.Description:
[b]Custom Decals - Placeable Signs and Images[/b]
Add customizable decals to your base in Stationeers.
This mod allows you to place decals (constructed with a Sign Kit) with custom images and sizes, using both built-in assets and user-provided PNG files.
[hr]
[b]Features[/b]
[list] [*]Placeable decal structures (similar to signs) [*]Support for custom PNG images [*]Independent front and back decals [*]Adjustable width and height per side [*]In-game reload command to reload user provided images (reloaddecals) [/list]
[hr]
[b]Custom Decals[/b]
You can add your own images:
[olist] [*]Go to: [code] Stationeers/BepInEx/config/CustomDecals/Decals/ [/code] [*]Add your .png files [*]If already have opened the game, run the command: [code] reloaddecals [/code] [/olist]
[hr]
[b]Configuration Format[/b]
Decals are configured using the item's name (using a labeller):
[code] front;back;widthFront;heightFront;widthBack;heightBack [/code]
Example:
[code] warning;hazard;1;1;3;3 [/code]
[hr]
[b]Notes[/b]
[list] [*]Only PNG images are supported for custom decals [*]Image size is recommended to be 1024x1024 or smaller, but larger images should work [/list]
[hr]
[b]Requirements[/b]
[list] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]Stationeers Launch Pad[/url] [/list]
[b]Links[/b] [list] Support: [url=https://discord.gg/UxzsWmwrpR]Stationeers Modding Discord[/url] [/list]
